signInDescription: Sign in to access your passwords
emailSentDescription: A sign-in link has been sent to your email address.
emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
passkeyNotSupported: Passkeys are not supported in this browser.
passkeySignInFailed: Passkey sign-in failed. Please try again.
alternativeSignIn: Sign in with email + security key
securityKeySignInFailed: Security key sign-in failed. Please try again.
authorizedOnly: Only authorized accounts can access this application.
personalWelcome: Sign in or create an account to get started.
errorDescription: An error occurred during sign in. Please ensure you are using an authorized account.
errorVerificationDescription: The sign-in link has expired or has already been used. Please try signing in again.
errorAccessDeniedDescription: Sign-in is not allowed for this account. Please make sure you are using the email address from the invitation.
googleMultiDomainHint: Please select an account from your organization's authorized domain.
